pluginDescription: Built-in utility plugin that filters candidates by minimum SNR
filterOverviewDesc: First reject stations that are too weak, then let the automatic calling strategy choose from the remaining candidates.
minSNRDesc: Candidates below this SNR threshold will be filtered out
prioritizeHigherSNR: After the threshold, rank by higher SNR
prioritizeHigherSNRDesc: On: after a station meets the minimum SNR above, automatic calling prefers candidates with higher SNR; new DXCC, new grid, or new callsign is used as secondary sorting. Off: after the threshold, novelty targets such as new DXCC or new grid can still be chosen first.
